methods.description: Process for measuring the holotype of 'Orthomyctera' chapalmalense using a digital caliper to compare with living species of Dolichotis.

steps.description: Measurements were taken with a 0.01 mm resolution digital caliper.

methods.description: A principal coordinate analysis (PCoA) was performed to assess the similarity of 'Orthomyctera' chapalmalense, D. patagonum, and D. salinicola in the context of Cavioidea within a low-dimensional space.

steps.description: Some fossil cavioids were removed from the character matrix prior to any subsequent analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: remove certain fossil cavioids from character matrix

steps.description: The PCoA was performed using PAST, which has the ability to handle an incomplete matrix.
Similarity was computed with the Gower Similarity index.
steps.searchable_summary: compute similarity using Gower Similarity index

steps.description: The Eigenvalue scaling option was selected, each axis using the square root of the Eigenvalue.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Eigenvalue scaling to PCoA axes

methods.description: Cladistic analysis to determine the phylogenetic position of D. chapalmalense and its relation to other species within Dolichotinae.

steps.description: The cladistic analysis resulted in more than 6,330 most parsimonious trees (MPTs) of 3,435 steps.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cladistic analysis to generate MPTs

steps.description: The reduced consensus of MPTs is shown in Fig. 7.
The analysis corroborates previous results in relation to the position of D. chapalmalense.
steps.searchable_summary: corroborate phylogenetic position of D. chapalmalense
